events.name: House of M
events.summary: Scarlet Witch rewrites reality. The 'No More Mutants' aftermath decimates the mutant population.

events.name: Decimation
events.summary: The 198 remaining mutants regroup while humanity hunts the depowered. X-Men: Deadly Genesis sets up Messiah Complex.

issues.title: Decimation: House of M: The Day After

events.name: X-Men: Messiah Complex
events.summary: First mutant birth since M-Day triggers a war. Hope Summers is born; X-Force reforms.

events.name: Avengers vs. X-Men
events.summary: The Phoenix Force returns to Earth. Avengers and X-Men clash over Hope Summers.

events.name: House of X / Powers of X
events.summary: Hickman reboots mutantkind on Krakoa. 12-issue interwoven reset of the X-Men.

events.name: Dawn of X + X of Swords
events.summary: Krakoan-era launch post-HoX/PoX: Dawn of X titles + X of Swords crossover.

issues.title: Giant-Size X-Men: Jean Grey and Emma Frost

events.name: Reign of X
events.summary: Post-X of Swords Krakoa era: Inferno, Hellfire Gala 2021, Trial of Magneto, X Lives/Deaths of Wolverine.

issues.title: King in Black: Return of the Valkyries

events.name: Destiny of X
events.summary: Krakoan era deepens: Immortal X-Men, X-Men Red, Legion of X, A.X.E., Knights of X.

events.name: A.X.E.: Judgment Day
events.summary: Eternals judge mutants and humanity. Orchis era builds.

events.name: Sins of Sinister
events.summary: Sinister corrupts the Krakoan resurrection protocols. Three alternate-timeline trilogies.

issues.title: Storm and the Brotherhood of Mutants
Storm and the Brotherhood of Mutants
Storm and the Brotherhood of Mutants

events.name: Fall of X
events.summary: Orchis dismantles Krakoa. The end of the Hickman/Gillen/Duggan/Ewing era.

events.name: Inhumans vs. X-Men
events.summary: Terrigen Mist decimates mutants. Inhumans and X-Men go to war.

issues.title: Deadpool and the Mercs For Money

events.name: Wolverine
events.summary: Logan's full reading order across eras — Claremont, Old Man Logan, Return of Wolverine, Krakoa.

issues.title: Issues: Wolverine: The Best There Is

events.name: Cable
events.summary: Nathan Summers / Askani'son from his New Mutants debut through X-Force, Cable & Deadpool and Krakoa.

events.name: X-Force
events.summary: The black-ops X-Men — from Cable's 90s X-Force to Uncanny X-Force and the Krakoan black-ops team.

events.name: New Mutants
events.summary: Marvel's second mutant generation — from Claremont's teens to X-Force, X-Men at School, and Krakoa.

events.name: X-Men (Complete Modern Era)
events.summary: The X-Men team spine across the modern era — Morrison, Whedon, Fraction, Bendis, Hickman, Krakoa and From the Ashes interwoven in one continuous reading order.

events.name: Dark Reign: Utopia
events.summary: Norman Osborn's Dark Avengers clash with the X-Men. Cyclops founds Utopia.

events.name: X-Men: Second Coming
events.summary: Hope Summers returns to the present. Nightcrawler dies. X-Force goes proactive.

issues.title: X-Men: Second Coming - Revelations: Blind Science

events.name: Age of X
events.summary: Legion creates an alternate reality where mutants are hunted. Short Carey crossover.

events.name: X-Men: Schism
events.summary: Cyclops vs. Wolverine. The X-Men split into two factions.

events.name: Avengers & X-Men: AXIS
events.summary: Red Skull becomes Onslaught. Magneto forms a reluctant alliance.

issues.title: Captain America and the Mighty Avengers
Captain America and the Mighty Avengers
Captain America and the Mighty Avengers

events.name: X-Men: Battle of the Atom
events.summary: Future X-Men come back to force the original time-displaced X-Men home.

events.name: From the Ashes
events.summary: Post-Krakoa era relaunch. X-Men return to flagship titles after Fall of X.

issues.title: Free Comic Book Day 2024: Blood Hunt/X-Men
Free Comic Book Day 2025: Fantastic Four/Giant-Size X-Men

events.name: Necrosha
events.summary: Selene and the Inner Circle resurrect dead mutants on Genosha.

events.name: Hellfire Galas
events.summary: Annual Krakoan soiree. Became a staging ground for major arcs (2021 reveal, 2022 Destiny of X, 2023 Fall of X).

events.name: Fear Itself
events.summary: The Serpent, God of Fear, returns and worthy heroes take up hammers. X-Men tie-ins throughout.

issues.title: Fear Itself: Book of the Skull
Black Panther: The Man Without Fear
Black Panther: The Man Without Fear
Black Panther: The Man Without Fear
Tomb of Dracula Presents: Throne of Blood

events.name: Dark X-Men
events.summary: Norman Osborn's Dark Reign X-Men team (2009) and the Fall-of-X–era relaunch (2023).

events.name: Age of Revelation
events.summary: Doug Ramsey unleashes an apocalyptic reality. Jonathan Hickman's follow-up to Krakoa.

events.name: Cyclops
events.summary: Scott Summers from squeaky-clean original X-Man to revolutionary mutant leader, his death, and return. Hand-curated across eras — focus on arcs where he's the protagonist or whose consequences define him.

issues.title: X-Men
issues.note: Jim Lee era — Scott leads Blue Team

issues.title: X-Men
issues.note: Hickman X-Men — Scott leads on Krakoa

issues.title: Uncanny X-Men
issues.note: From the Ashes — Rogue's team, Scott elsewhere

issues.title: X-Men
issues.note: From the Ashes — Scott's team leader again

events.name: West Coast Avengers
events.summary: Hawkeye-led Avengers on the west coast — the original Englehart/Byrne run, the 2018 Kelly Thompson revival, and the 2024 Ewing return.

issues.title: West Coast Avengers
issues.note: Pacific Overtures — rebrand to Avengers West Coast

events.name: Grant Morrison — New X-Men
events.summary: Morrison's radical reset: Emma Frost joins, Cassandra Nova, secondary mutations, Jean's death, Xorn, Here Comes Tomorrow.

events.name: Joss Whedon — Astonishing X-Men
events.summary: Team back-to-basics: Gifted, Dangerous, Torn, Unstoppable. The return of Colossus; the Cure; Danger; Breakworld.

events.name: Ed Brubaker — Uncanny X-Men
events.summary: Rise and Fall of the Shi'ar Empire, The Extremists, Divided We Stand. Sets up the post-Decimation status quo.

events.name: Matt Fraction — Uncanny X-Men
events.summary: Manifest Destiny → Utopia → Second Coming → Five Lights. San Francisco era ends, Utopia born.

events.name: Kieron Gillen — Uncanny X-Men
events.summary: Fear Itself, Schism, Regenesis and the start of AvX from Cyclops' extinction-team angle.

events.name: Jason Aaron — Wolverine and the X-Men
events.summary: Post-Schism Jean Grey School. Kid Omega, Hellfire Brats, Age of Ultron, AvX tie-ins.

events.name: Brian Michael Bendis — All-New X-Men
events.summary: Original 5 X-Men time-displaced to the present. Paired with Uncanny X-Men vol.3 by the same author.

events.name: Brian Michael Bendis — Uncanny X-Men (vol.3)
events.summary: Revolutionary Cyclops' extinction team, post-AvX. Paired with All-New X-Men.

events.name: Uncanny X-Men
events.summary: The flagship X-Men title across the modern era — Brubaker sets up Decimation aftermath, Fraction drives Utopia + Second Coming, Gillen pivots to Schism, Bendis reframes Cyclops post-AvX.
